title: FCProject - Totem Pack
description: ❕Totems with players from our Minecraft server 💥ANIMATED💥
body:
![all types of totems:](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/732170804556595223/1228987678817779763/sasha.png?ex=662e0af8&is=661b95f8&hm=31454e299e8717bd31ea7f39c9357d3c5ccc487a7bd3f7574584da9e6442ebef&)

Go to the anvil and simply rename the totem to a nickname from the list:

Here are all the keywords for named totems
Simply rename your totem using the keywords below
==========================================
### Totems of FCproject players
- LuckyVIP - *LuckyVIP
- +Sleep LuckyVIP - *LuckyVIP zzz
- SMSka_ - *SMSka_
- TIP_ok - *TIP ok
- ZET - *ZET
- akatomi12 - *akatomi12
- _GemsterG_ - *GemsterG_
- PandvisVP3 - *PandvisVP3
- JIMIMINI - *jimimini
- asutochka - *asutochka
- rozika - *rozika

1. ** The symbol means that any text can be used instead.
2. All alphabetic characters can be either at the top or in the saved register.
